context: Tests that naming a known featured workflow (e.g. retargeting) routes through get_featured_workflow's fast path instead of composing a graph from scratch via compose_workflow. Skipping this check wastes a compose step and risks producing a worse, non-template graph when a vetted one already exists.

checklist.name: Calls get_featured_workflow first
checklist.description: The agent called get_featured_workflow (with a query reflecting 'retargeting') before any call to compose_workflow.

checklist.name: No premature compose_workflow
checklist.description: The agent did not call compose_workflow when a named featured workflow was requested and a match was available, skipping the from-scratch graph-building path.

checklist.name: Uploads local assets correctly
checklist.description: The agent called upload_asset for the local product photos and used the returned presigned URLs verbatim (no truncation or reconstruction) in the submission.

checklist.name: Uses session_id submission
checklist.description: When a single prepared match was returned, the agent submitted via run_workflow_submit using session_id and useSessionDefaults rather than re-sending the full actions/connections graph.

checklist.name: Reports output or status
checklist.description: The agent reported back batch/run status or output URLs to the user rather than ending the turn silently after submission.
